market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this warm, fully-equipped apartment perfect for 4 guests. Recently renovated with modern touches, it features [insert specific high-value amenities if available]. Located just minutes from [local landmark/amenity], the apartment offers excellent access to public transport and popular attractions. While our rate of £120 per night is 22% below the local market average (median £154.60), we maintain a 4.95-star rating across 62 guest reviews. For a more complete stay experience, consider [list 3 high-priority amenities missing from listing]. Sleep soundly in [mention specific bedroom/bathroom features] and enjoy fully functional kitchen, free WiFi, and [any unique selling point based on property type]. Book your 33.7% open nights and experience why 60 guests can occupy this space within the next 90 days.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Feature a wide-angle shot of the living room as the cover photo to showcase space and ambience, followed by bedroom/bathroom images
key_diagnosis: Title lacks local landmarks/amenities despite 4.95 rating (12 characters to add would increase SEO relevance)
Description entirely missing for 62 review property - critical to listing performance
No amenities listed despite 60 open nights in 90-day calendar (market median occupancy is 47.8%)
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £120 rate is 22% below the local market median, yet 33.7% occupancy falls 14.1% short of the median 47.8%
